description_long: This nightclub is a rectangular, multi-story commercial building with a dark, industrial facade. The front features large, grid-like windows on the upper level and two wide, wooden-textured garage-style doors below, suggesting a main entrance or loading area. Above the doors, a prominent neon dragon sign in green and red adds a vibrant, eye-catching element, hinting at an Asian or themed nightlife venue. The sides and rear of the building are plain, with a weathered, concrete-like texture and no visible windows or doors. The roof is flat and unadorned, extending slightly beyond the building's footprint. The structure sits on a dark, rectangular base, possibly representing a sidewalk or entry plaza.
description: A dark, industrial-style nightclub with a neon dragon sign above wide wooden doors and large front windows, set on a flat base.
description_view_0: The front view shows large upper windows, two wide wooden doors, and a neon dragon sign above the entrance.
description_view_1: The left side is plain, with a weathered concrete texture and no windows or doors visible.
description_view_2: The rear view is featureless, showing only the flat, concrete-textured back wall.
description_view_3: The right side mirrors the left, with a plain, weathered concrete surface and no openings.
attribute_signage: A large neon dragon sign in green and red is mounted above the main entrance on the front facade, likely made of illuminated plastic or glass tubing with metal supports.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance consists of two wide, wooden-textured garage-style doors set beneath large grid windows, with a neon dragon sign above. The entry is flush with the facade and lacks steps, awnings, or ramps.
